AWC.Settings.LightThreshold.Name: Light Armor Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.LightThreshold.Hint: Armor weight as % of carry capacity below which armor is considered Light. Default: 33
AWC.Settings.MediumThreshold.Name: Medium Armor Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.MediumThreshold.Hint: Armor weight as % of carry capacity below which armor is considered Medium (above this = Heavy). Default: 66
AWC.Settings.ShowIndicator.Name: Show Weight Class Indicator
AWC.Settings.ShowIndicator.Hint: Display a color-coded weight class badge on the character sheet next to equipped armor.
AWC.Settings.ApplyEncumbrance.Name: Apply Encumbrance Penalties
AWC.Settings.ApplyEncumbrance.Hint: Automatically apply speed and ability check penalties based on the calculated armor weight class, overriding the item's stated type.
